message:
docs: update test commands to match corrected test script

Update README.md and docs/getting-started.md to use `bun run test`
instead of bare `bun test`, matching the CI workflow fix. Also update
the coverage example to `bun run test -- --coverage` to ensure the
flag is properly forwarded through the package.json script.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,7 +93,7 @@ flywheel_gateway/
 bun dev
 
 # Run tests
-bun test
+bun run test
 
 # Run E2E tests
 bun test:e2e

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # Coverage Baseline Report
 
 Generated: 2026-01-29
-Command: `bun test --coverage`
+Command: `bun run test -- --coverage`
 
 ## Test Suite Summary

@@ -217,13 +217,13 @@ Track AI usage costs at `/cost-analytics`:
 
 ```bash
 # All tests
-bun test
+bun run test
 
 # Specific test file
 bun test apps/gateway/src/__tests__/agent.service.test.ts
 
 # With coverage
-bun test --coverage
+bun run test -- --coverage
 ```
 
 ### Lint and Format

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ This document describes how to run tests, understand test patterns, and write ne
 
 | Command | Description |
 |---------|-------------|
-| `bun test` | Run all unit tests |
+| `bun run test` | Run all unit tests |
 | `bun test <path>` | Run specific test file |
 | `bun test --filter <pattern>` | Run tests matching pattern |
 | `bun test:e2e` | Run Playwright E2E tests |
@@ -285,7 +285,7 @@ describe("br client contract", () => {
 ### All Tests
 
 ```bash
-bun test
+bun run test
 ```
 
 ### Specific File
@@ -297,13 +297,13 @@ bun test apps/gateway/src/__tests__/safety.routes.test.ts
 ### Watch Mode
 
 ```bash
-bun test --watch
+bun run test -- --watch
 ```
 
 ### With Coverage
 
 ```bash
-bun test --coverage
+bun run test -- --coverage
 ```
 
 ### Filtering by Name
